message:
test(P2.9): Claude Code parity matrix — 12 integration tests for symmetric protocol coverage

Adds deny matrix (4 destructive commands with full field assertions), allow
matrix (7 safe commands), warn path (permissionDecision=ask via per-rule
override), bypass (DCG_BYPASS including empty-string edge case), history
persistence (enabled via config + DCG_HISTORY_DB), allow-once round-trip
(deny→redeem --yes→retry passes), and cross-protocol structural parity tests.

Every Claude scenario mirrors a Codex scenario in P2.2-P2.7; reviewers can
read off which test covers which contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
